name: Meatballs in Sauce with Rice
recipeInstructions:
- 2 servings of 6 meatballs, 1/4 cup sauce, and 3/4 cup rice each
- 440 calories per serving
1. Thaw frozen meatball mixture in refrigerator.
2. Divide into 12 portions. Shape into balls.
3. Brown meatballs on all sides in hot frypan. Drain excess fat.
4. Mix remaining ingredients except rice. Pour over meatballs.
5. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently until sauce thickens—about 10 minutes. Spoon sauce over meatballs once during cooking.
6. Serve over rice.
